title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Astral Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
